speaker: speaker1
text: Hi , who has the remote control ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I do . Why , do you want me to change the channel ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , please . I can't stand watching the channel any more .

speaker: speaker2
text: I think they have pretty good programmes . But I'll change it if you really want .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , I hate Channel 5 . I'd rather just listen to the radio .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don't make such a fuss . I'm sure you will like today's programme .

speaker: speaker1
text: A basketball match between Chinese team and American team .
